retry_reason: Not a wrapper — the put operation is unconditional when skb is non-NULL, and there is no failure path to retry.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is cleanup of an rx buffer: DMA unmapping and freeing the skb. The dev_kfree_skb_any call (skb put) is one part of the cleanup, but the function also performs DMA unmapping and zeroing fields, which are not refcount management. Hence it is not primarily a reference-count wrapper.
judge.retry_reason: Not a wrapper — the put operation is unconditional when skb is non-NULL, and there is no failure path to retry.

final.retry_reason: Not a wrapper — the put operation is unconditional when skb is non-NULL, and there is no failure path to retry.
